SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196

Class Ech0196MappingService

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.Ech0196MappingService
@Service public class Ech0196MappingService extends Object
Maps GT dividend report data and ICTax tax data to an eCH-0196 v2.2.0 JAXB model. All securities across all security accounts are merged into a single depot element, as the tax authorities view the portfolio as one virtual depot.

    Ech0196TaxStatement
    buildTaxStatement(TaxStatementExportRequest request, SecurityDividendsGrandTotal grandTotal)
    Builds an eCH-0196 tax statement from the dividend report for a specific year.

  • Method Details

    • buildTaxStatement

      public Ech0196TaxStatement buildTaxStatement(TaxStatementExportRequest request, SecurityDividendsGrandTotal grandTotal)
      Builds an eCH-0196 tax statement from the dividend report for a specific year.
      Parameters:
      request - export parameters (year, canton, institution/client details)
      grandTotal - the computed dividend report containing all years
      Returns:
      a fully populated JAXB model ready for XML marshalling
